SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-26-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH LEE IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC/COURTCALL APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT EUROMARKET DBA CRATE AND BARRELL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KIMBERLY WOO, REGIONAL ASSET PROTECTION MANAGER. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EUROMARKET DESIGNS DBA CRATE & BARREL AKA CB2 $857.50 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $982.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
